Name: Quality
Title: Graphics Quality
Description: Sets the overall graphical quality preset

Name: Resolution
Title: Resolution
Description: Sets the screen display resolution

Name: WindowMode
Title: Window Mode
Description: Sets the window display mode

Name: Gamma
Title: Gamma
Description: Adjusts the brightness and gamma calibration

Name: Upscaler
Title: Upscaling Method
Description: Selects the upscaling method

Name: DLSS_SR
Title: DLSS Super Resolution
Description: Enables NVIDIA DLSS to improve performance using AI upscaling

Name: DLSS_FG
Title: DLSS Frame Generation
Description: Enables DLSS 3 Frame Generation to insert AI-generated frames and boost framerate

Name: DLSS_Reflex
Title: NVIDIA Reflex
Description: Reduces input latency for a more responsive gaming experience

Name: FSR_SR
Title: FSR Super Resolution
Description: Enables AMD FidelityFX Super Resolution to upscale the image and improve performance

Name: FSR_FG
Title: FSR Frame Generation
Description: Enables AMD FSR Frame Generation to insert interpolated frames and increase framerate

Name: Audio_Master
Title: Master Volume
Description: Adjusts the master audio volume for the entire game

Name: Audio_Music
Title: Music Volume
Description: Adjusts the volume of the in-game music

Name: Audio_SFX
Title: SFX Volume
Description: Adjusts the volume of the sound effects

Name: Audio_Ambience
Title: Ambience Volume
Description: Adjusts the volume of background environmental audio

Name: ViewDistance
Title: View Distance
Description: Adjusts the rendering distance of objects and terrain details

Name: AntiAliasing
Title: Anti-Aliasing
Description: Smooths jagged edges on 3D geometry

Name: Shadows
Title: Shadow Quality
Description: Adjusts the resolution and rendering distance of dynamic shadows

Name: GlobalIllumination
Title: Global Illumination
Description: Adjusts the quality of dynamic indirect lighting and ambient occlusion

Name: Reflections
Title: Reflection Quality
Description: Adjusts the realism and resolution of reflections

Name: Textures
Title: Texture Quality
Description: Adjusts the resolution of textures (requires more VRAM)

Name: Effects
Title: Effects Quality
Description: Adjusts the quality of particles and visual effects

Name: PostProcessing
Title: Post-Processing
Description: Adjusts the quality of motion blur, bloom, depth of field, and lens flares

Name: Foliage
Title: Foliage Quality
Description: Adjusts the density and rendering distance of grass and trees

Name: Shading
Title: Shading Quality
Description: Adjusts the complexity and detail of materials and shaders
